title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 80.070 - Trustees — quorum
text:
80.070.  Trustees — quorum. — At all meetings of the board, a majority of the trustees shall constitute a quorum to do business; a smaller number may adjourn from day to day, and may compel the attendance of absent members in such manner and under such penalties as the board of trustees previously, by ordinance, may have prescribed.
(RSMo 1939 § 7246) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7095; 1919 § 8545; 1909 § 9434
